svg.title: Merged workflow schema
svg.desc: A diagram showing the merged workflow schema with state, steps, and node types

g.text: .in maps to initial state keys on start
.out maps from state keys on finish
graph can be registered as a tool itself
condition node outputs: { from: "cond_1", to: "node_b", when: "if_true" }
executor validates: every node must have a complete outgoing edge set or be terminal
a saved workflow can be registered as a tool — graphs compose like functions
